action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline val Spearman 0.8836 with frozen ESM2 features + MLP. Model overfitted (best at epoch 20). Precomputed features saved. Analysis: For two_vs_many extrapolation, need mutation-aware features (count, pairwise interactions) and better regularization. Decision: Add mutation count + per-position indicators + pairwise co-mutation indicators (407 features), use deeper MLP with batch norm, early stopping, and learning rate warmup.
